data.name: Paradise Lust
data.detailed_description:
Paradise Adventure

Paradise Lust is a mix between a visual novel, dating sim, and adventure game - interspersed with a number of minigames. You’re the bartender of a yacht full of beauty queens, marooned on an idyllic island in the South Pacific.

Island Romance

You’ll meet girls, flirt with them, and learn about their lives, loves, and passions. As you grow closer, they’ll invite you to various relaxing activities, like swimming, stretching, yoga, and photography.

Tropical Lust

Successful romance leads to fully animated sex scenes with over a dozen different women, each with their own deep story, character, and desires. Unlock all of the various scenarios by unraveling each of their personal stories.

Puzzles and Subgames

Throughout the story are various puzzles and subgames, allowing you to fish in the sea, run your own bar, paint illustrations of the girls, piece together jigsaws, and many other challenges.
data.about_the_game:
Paradise Adventure

Paradise Lust is a mix between a visual novel, dating sim, and adventure game - interspersed with a number of minigames. You’re the bartender of a yacht full of beauty queens, marooned on an idyllic island in the South Pacific.

Island Romance

You’ll meet girls, flirt with them, and learn about their lives, loves, and passions. As you grow closer, they’ll invite you to various relaxing activities, like swimming, stretching, yoga, and photography.

Tropical Lust

Successful romance leads to fully animated sex scenes with over a dozen different women, each with their own deep story, character, and desires. Unlock all of the various scenarios by unraveling each of their personal stories.

Puzzles and Subgames

Throughout the story are various puzzles and subgames, allowing you to fish in the sea, run your own bar, paint illustrations of the girls, piece together jigsaws, and many other challenges.
data.short_description: A 2D Point & Click Dating Adventure set on an idyllic tropical island. Meet and romance girls, catch fish, serve drinks, solve puzzles, and get laid in a paradise of intrigue, romance, and lust.
data.reviews:
“Paradise Lust is a quality logic and erotic game.”
Gaming Professors

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (32-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 / AMD FX-6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible GPU (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GT 1030 / AMD Radeon RX 550 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (Dual-core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 / Intel Core i5 (Quad-core)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Apple M1 GPU / Radeon Pro 560X or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or Ubuntu 18.04 LTS (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 / AMD FX-6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.2 compatible GPU (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (64-bit) or equivalent
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GT 1030 / AMD Radeon RX 550 or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
